actions.detail: create 422: {"error":{"code":"VALIDATION_FAILED","message":"request validation failed","trace_id":"019f644e-e659-7234-808b-a2f6d981f3ec","details":[{"field":"body.tags.1","problem":"Input should be a valid string

deferred.reason: CMM-FR-010/011 ontology registration (Patient, Provider, Encounter, ChronicCondition, BehavioralHealthDx, Discharge, Consent, CarePlan, CareCoordinationActivity, DeviceReading, BillingCandidate, RACAuditPackage, with phi:true field tagging) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the two semantic models and the seed dataset schemas.

CMM-FR-130..138 OPA policies (hipaa.rego, cms_code_mutual_exclusion, cms_time_thresholds, consent_required, rpm_16day_rule, tcm_window, apcm_tier_eligibility, rac_audit_trail, fqhc_rhc_g0511) require guardrail-service policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral guarantees are partially covered today by Core invariants (proposal-mode + four-eyes approval on every billing decision — BR-2) plus the same rules encoded as retrievable grounding memories and the case-triage agent's instructions.

CMM-FR-001 golden sets (code_selection, enrollment, documentation, care_plan per evals/*.jsonl) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

CMM-FR-030..101 bespoke recipes (enrollment_scanner, care_scribe, code_selection, care_plan_drafter, documentation_auditor, rpm_reviewer, tcm_prioritizer, outreach_scheduler) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (a Core code surface, BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead; BR-2 (no autonomous billing) holds because agent-runtime is proposal-mode only.

CMM-FR-110 EHR/RPM/telephony connectors (epic_ambulatory, athenahealth, eclinicalworks, nextgen, cerner_ambulatory, rpm_optimize_health, rpm_cadence, rpm_ihealth, phone_rc, telehealth_doxy) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

CMM-FR-111/112 SoR write adapters (epic/athena/ecw care-activity, care-plan, and billing-candidate writes with Idempotency-Key case_id:proposal_id) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; all platform-side writes remain proposal-mode (BR-2 CMM_AUTONOMOUS_BILLING_FORBIDDEN).

CMM-FR-033/090 model archetypes (enrollment_propensity, readmission_risk_30d) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the enrollment-propensity capability ships today as a real training pipeline seed instead (pipelines/templates.yaml).

CMM-FR-141 typed case schemas (care_activity_review, monthly_billing_review, care_plan_review, rpm_data_review, tcm_discharge) await case-service schema materialization; today's seeded queue carries the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.
CMM-FR-160 label overlays (labels/en.yaml, PHI-safe patient display templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints which are pack-service-tier features.
